description: Mappings from PostureIQ evidence types to MCSB controls

controls.title: Establish network segmentation boundaries
controls.rationale: Network segmentation limits the blast radius of attacks by restricting lateral movement.
controls.recommendation: Implement network security groups and virtual network segmentation for all workloads.

controls.title: Use centralized identity and authentication system
controls.rationale: Centralized identity management reduces the risk of credential sprawl and enables consistent policy enforcement.
controls.recommendation: Ensure all applications use Microsoft Entra ID for authentication.

controls.title: Protect identity and authentication systems
controls.rationale: Identity systems are high-value targets and must be protected with strong controls.
controls.recommendation: Enable Conditional Access policies requiring MFA for all users, especially administrators.

controls.title: Manage application identities securely
controls.rationale: Application credentials that expire or are misconfigured create security risks.
controls.recommendation: Use managed identities where possible. Rotate app credentials regularly and avoid long-lived secrets.

controls.title: Separate and limit highly privileged/administrative users
controls.rationale: Limiting privileged access reduces the attack surface and impact of compromised accounts.
controls.recommendation: Minimize the number of users with Owner/Contributor/Global Administrator roles.

controls.title: Follow just enough administration principle
controls.rationale: Granting only required permissions limits the impact of credential compromise.
controls.recommendation: Review and reduce overly broad role assignments. Use custom roles where appropriate.

controls.title: Align organization roles, responsibilities, and accountabilities
controls.rationale: Clear accountability ensures security responsibilities are met.
controls.recommendation: Ensure resource groups have appropriate tagging and ownership metadata.

controls.title: Enable threat detection capabilities
controls.rationale: Diagnostic settings enable detection and investigation of security incidents.
controls.recommendation: Enable diagnostic settings for all critical resources and send logs to a central workspace.

controls.title: Enable logging for security investigation
controls.rationale: Logging is essential for detecting, investigating, and responding to security incidents.
controls.recommendation: Enable diagnostic settings on all resources that support them.

controls.title: Use only approved services
controls.rationale: Restricting allowed services reduces the attack surface and simplifies compliance.
controls.recommendation: Implement Azure Policy to restrict resource types to approved services.

controls.title: Encrypt sensitive data in transit
controls.rationale: Data in transit must be encrypted to prevent interception.
controls.recommendation: Enforce HTTPS/TLS for all services and use Azure Policy to audit encryption in transit.

controls.title: Enable data at rest encryption by default
controls.rationale: Data at rest encryption protects against unauthorized access to stored data.
controls.recommendation: Verify all storage services use encryption at rest. Use Azure Policy to enforce.

controls.title: Use strong authentication controls - MFA Registration
controls.rationale: All users must be registered for MFA.
controls.recommendation: Enforce MFA registration. Target 90%+ rate.

controls.title: Restrict resource access based on conditions - Risky Users
controls.rationale: Risky users must be detected and remediated.
controls.recommendation: Enable Identity Protection. Remediate high-risk users.

controls.title: Restrict the exposure of credential and secrets - Cross-Tenant
controls.rationale: Cross-tenant access must be controlled.
controls.recommendation: Configure cross-tenant MFA trust. Restrict B2B collaboration.

controls.title: Define and implement security posture management strategy - Policy Compliance
controls.rationale: Policy compliance must be continuously monitored.
controls.recommendation: Remediate non-compliant resources. Target 80%+ compliance.

controls.title: Enable network logging for security investigation - Defender Plans
controls.rationale: Defender for Cloud plans must be enabled for workload protection.
controls.recommendation: Enable all Defender plans. Configure auto-provisioning and contacts.

controls.title: Follow just enough administration principle - PIM
controls.rationale: Privileged access must be time-bound with MFA.
controls.recommendation: Require MFA and justification. Limit activation to 8 hours.

controls.title: Determine access process for cloud provider support - Access Reviews
controls.rationale: Access must be reviewed periodically.
controls.recommendation: Configure recurring access reviews for privileged roles.

controls.title: Use customer-managed key option in data at rest encryption - VM Security
controls.rationale: VMs must be hardened with encryption and security agents.
controls.recommendation: Enable disk encryption, managed identity, and MDE.

controls.title: Use a secure key management process - Web App Security
controls.rationale: Web apps must enforce secure configuration.
controls.recommendation: Enable HTTPS, TLS 1.2+, disable FTP and remote debugging.

controls.title: Use a secure certificate management process - SQL Security
controls.rationale: Databases must use strong auth, encryption, and auditing.
controls.recommendation: Configure AD admin, auditing, TDE, restrict public access.

controls.title: Ensure security of key and certificate repository - AKS Security
controls.rationale: Container platforms must enforce security controls.
controls.recommendation: Enable RBAC, AAD, network policy, Defender for Containers.

controls.title: Deploy intrusion detection/intrusion prevention - Firewall
controls.rationale: Firewalls must have threat intelligence and rule collections.
controls.recommendation: Enable threat intelligence. Configure rule collections.

controls.title: Deploy DDOS protection - Route and Flow Log Security
controls.rationale: Network routes and flow logs must be properly configured.
controls.recommendation: Configure controlled routing. Enable NSG flow logs.

controls.title: Centralize security log management and analysis - Monitoring
controls.rationale: Centralized monitoring must cover all critical resources.
controls.recommendation: Configure Log Analytics, alert rules, and action groups.

controls.title: AI Services Data Protection
controls.rationale: AI accounts must enforce network isolation, disable local auth, and use CMK.
controls.recommendation: Disable public access, disable local auth, enable CMK on AI accounts.

controls.title: Resource Group Asset Management
controls.rationale: Resource groups must be tagged for asset management.
controls.recommendation: Apply mandatory tags to all resource groups.

controls.title: AI Deployment Governance
controls.rationale: AI deployments must have responsible AI guardrails.
controls.recommendation: Configure content filter policies and rate limits on AI deployments.

controls.title: ML Workspace Network Security
controls.rationale: ML workspaces must use private endpoints and disable public access.
controls.recommendation: Disable public network access. Configure private endpoints.

controls.title: Storage Account Data Protection
controls.rationale: Storage accounts must enforce encryption, soft delete, and network isolation.
controls.recommendation: Enable HTTPS-only, soft delete, TLS 1.2, and configure firewall.

controls.title: Container Registry Posture
controls.rationale: Container registries must disable admin access and enable content trust.
controls.recommendation: Disable admin user. Enable content trust. Use private endpoints.

controls.title: Container App Network Security
controls.rationale: Container Apps must enforce HTTPS ingress and managed identity.
controls.recommendation: Disable insecure connections. Enable managed identity.

controls.title: Cosmos DB Data Protection
controls.rationale: Cosmos DB must disable local auth and use CMK encryption.
controls.recommendation: Disable local auth. Enable CMK. Use private endpoints.

controls.title: Database Server Protection
controls.rationale: Database servers must disable public access and enable HA.
controls.recommendation: Disable public access. Enable HA. Enable geo-redundant backup.

controls.title: Application Gateway WAF
controls.rationale: Application Gateways must enable WAF in Prevention mode.
controls.recommendation: Enable WAF. Set Prevention mode. Configure TLS 1.2.

controls.title: API Management Network Security
controls.rationale: APIM must disable legacy TLS and use VNet integration.
controls.recommendation: Disable TLS 1.0/1.1. Configure VNet. Enable managed identity.

controls.title: Storage Container Public Access Control
controls.rationale: Storage containers must not allow anonymous public access.
controls.recommendation: Set all containers to Private. Configure lifecycle and immutability policies.

controls.title: SQL Server Threat Detection and Auditing
controls.rationale: SQL Servers must enable ATP and per-database auditing.
controls.recommendation: Enable ATP. Configure vulnerability assessment. Verify per-database auditing.

controls.title: Web Application Security Posture
controls.rationale: Web Apps must enable authentication and restrict access.
controls.recommendation: Enable App Service Auth. Restrict CORS. Configure IP restrictions.

controls.title: Database Server Logging Configuration
controls.rationale: Database servers must enforce secure transport and audit logging.
controls.recommendation: Enable require_secure_transport. Enable log_checkpoints and audit logging.

controls.title: Container Registry Image Posture
controls.rationale: ACR repositories must enforce tag immutability.
controls.recommendation: Enable tag immutability. Clean up stale repositories.

controls.title: Preparation - Incident Detection
controls.rationale: Microsoft Cloud Security Benchmark requires incident detection capabilities.
controls.recommendation: Enable Defender for Cloud and configure alert rules.

controls.title: Preparation - Security Contact
controls.rationale: Security contacts must be configured for incident escalation.
controls.recommendation: Configure security contacts with alert notifications.

controls.title: Detection and Analysis - Alert Infrastructure
controls.rationale: Alert infrastructure must support incident investigation.
controls.recommendation: Configure action groups with diverse receivers.

controls.title: Post-Incident - Investigation Readiness
controls.rationale: Log infrastructure must support forensic investigation.
controls.recommendation: Deploy Log Analytics and configure comprehensive diagnostic settings.

controls.title: Change Control Policies
controls.rationale: Azure policies must enforce change governance.
controls.recommendation: Assign policies with deny/audit effects for change control.

controls.title: Resource Lock Protection
controls.rationale: Critical resources must be protected with locks.
controls.recommendation: Apply CanNotDelete locks on production resource groups.

controls.title: Ensure Regular Automated Backups
controls.rationale: Automated backups must protect critical workloads.
controls.recommendation: Deploy Recovery Services vaults with soft delete.

controls.title: Geo-Redundant Data Protection
controls.rationale: Data must be geo-redundant for disaster recovery.
controls.recommendation: Use GRS/RA-GRS replication for storage accounts.

controls.title: Asset Inventory and Tracking
controls.rationale: All cloud assets must be inventoried and tracked.
controls.recommendation: Maintain comprehensive resource inventory.

controls.title: Software Inventory Control
controls.rationale: Only authorized software and resource types should be deployed.
controls.recommendation: Use allowed resource type policies to control deployments.

controls.title: Log Retention and Archival
controls.rationale: Logs must be retained for sufficient investigation period.
controls.recommendation: Set Log Analytics retention to at least 90 days.
